infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FitTrack needs camera access to scan your food and estimate calories.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FitTrack needs photo library access to select food images for calorie analysis.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FitTrack needs your location to track your workout route in real-time.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: FitTrack needs background location access to keep tracking your workout when your screen is off.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: FitTrack needs background location to keep tracking your workout when your screen is off.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow FitTrack to use your location to track your workouts, even when the app is in the background.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow FitTrack to access your camera to scan food.
plugins.photosPermission: Allow FitTrack to access your photos to select food images.
